title: Cat Repellent Treatment, Single Pack Repellent Collar, Adjustable for Small Medium Large Cats, Glow in the Dark Natural Waterproof Design (Single Pack Purple)
features: Long-Lasting Benefits: Pawsguard cat repellent collar comes with single cat collars to help keep your feline friend comfortable and free from unwanted pests. Each collar lasts up to 8 months with a slow-release mechanism against insects.
One Size for All Cats: Whether you have a kitten or an adult cat, this adjustable collar is designed to fit comfortably, providing a secure yet gentle wear for cats of all sizes.

Natural Ingredients: Infused with Lavender Oil, Lemon Eucalyptus Oil, Linaloe Oil, and Citronella Essential Oil in a gentle, low concentration safe for your cat all known for their insect-repelling properties this collar is natural and toxin-free.
Glow in the Dark: No need for extra reflectors like others this cat collar glows in the dark, improving night time visibility and adding a stylish touch to your feline’s look.
Waterproof Design: Crafted from soft, waterproof material, this repellent collar stays on during outdoor adventures, rainy days, or even playful splashes without losing effectiveness.
description: From the brand Previous page At Pawsguard, we are dedicated to enhancing the lives of pets and their owners. Our mission is to create safe, natural, and effective solutions that protect your pets. From repellent collars to innovative pet care products, we focus on quality, affordability, and comfort. We strive to make pet care simple, reliable, and stress-free, so you can enjoy more moments with your beloved companions. Protecting Paws, Every Step! Visit the store Paw Care You Can Trust! Visit the store How we get our start? Pawsguard provides safe, natural, and affordable solutions, crafting collars that protect pets and offer owners peace of mind every day. Why we love what we do? We believe pets are family, and we’re driven by the joy of helping pet owners care for their furry friends. Seeing happy, healthy pets and satisfied customers is what inspires us to innovate and improve every day. How do we care for your pets? Every product we create is designed with your pet's safety and comfort in mind. We treat your pets like our own, ensuring they get the best care possible. Next page
